DPR: Compile a comprehensive dataset of "Weird Al" Yankovic's filmography and media appearances, including his roles in films, television shows, and other productions, and analyze how his involvement in different types of media and his portrayal in various roles have evolved over time, as well as identify any notable patterns or collaborations throughout his career.
dpr_text: Compile a comprehensive dataset of "Weird Al" Yankovic's filmography and media appearances, including his roles in films, television shows, and other productions, and analyze how his involvement in different types of media and his portrayal in various roles have evolved over time, as well as identify any notable patterns or collaborations throughout his career.
generated_sql:
SELECT 
  T1.Year, 
  T1.Title, 
  T1.Role, 
  T2.Notes AS T2_Notes, 
  T3.Notes AS T3_Notes
FROM 
  T1
  LEFT JOIN T2 ON T1.Title = T2.Title AND T1.Year = T2.Year
  LEFT JOIN T3 ON T1.Title = T3.Title AND T1.Year = T3.Year
ORDER BY 
  T1.Year

generated_sql:

generated_sql: SELECT T1.Year, T1.Title, T1.Role, T1.Title AS Title1, T2.Notes AS Notes1, T2.Title AS Title2, T2.Role AS Role2, T2.Notes AS Notes2, T3.Notes AS Notes3, T3.Title AS Title3, T3.Role AS Role3 FROM T1 INNER JOIN T2 ON T1.Title = T2.Title INNER JOIN T3 ON T2.Title = T3.Title LIMIT 100

DPR: Compile a dataset that captures historical information on political representation in British Columbia and athlete performance in International Cross Country Championships, allowing for queries on trends in electoral outcomes, athlete performance over time, and comparisons between different political parties and national teams, and assess how factors such as constituency, party affiliation, nationality, and event year influence these trends and outcomes.
dpr_text: Compile a dataset that captures historical information on political representation in British Columbia and athlete performance in International Cross Country Championships, allowing for queries on trends in electoral outcomes, athlete performance over time, and comparisons between different political parties and national teams, and assess how factors such as constituency, party affiliation, nationality, and event year influence these trends and outcomes.
generated_sql:
SELECT 
  T4.Electoral_district, 
  T4.Party, 
  T5.Rank, 
  T5.Athlete, 
  T5.Nationality, 
  T5.Time, 
  T6.Rank AS Rank_2, 
  T6.Athlete AS Athlete_2, 
  T6.Nationality AS Nationality_2, 
  T6.Time AS Time_2, 
  T7.Rank AS Rank_3, 
  T7.Athlete AS Athlete_3, 
  T7.Nationality AS Nationality_3, 
  T7.Time AS Time_3
FROM 
  T4
  LEFT JOIN T5 ON T4.Member = T5.Athlete
  LEFT JOIN T6 ON T4.Member = T6.Athlete
  LEFT JOIN T7 ON T4.Member = T7.Athlete
LIMIT 100;

DPR: Compile a dataset that combines historical political data with international athletic competition results, specifically focusing on the 14th Parliament of British Columbia and the International Cross Country Championships from 1898, 1913, and 1920. This dataset should allow for queries on political party representation and changes in parliamentary composition over time, as well as athlete performance, national team standings, and trends in completion times across different championships. The data should support analyses of how political demographics and athletic performances reflect broader societal or international trends, enabling insights into both the political history of British Columbia and the evolution of international cross-country running.
dpr_text: Compile a dataset that combines historical political data with international athletic competition results, specifically focusing on the 14th Parliament of British Columbia and the International Cross Country Championships from 1898, 1913, and 1920. This dataset should allow for queries on political party representation and changes in parliamentary composition over time, as well as athlete performance, national team standings, and trends in completion times across different championships. The data should support analyses of how political demographics and athletic performances reflect broader societal or international trends, enabling insights into both the political history of British Columbia and the evolution of international cross-country running.
generated_sql:
SELECT T4.Electoral_district, T4.Party, T5.Rank, T5.Athlete, T5.Nationality, T5.Time 
FROM T4 
JOIN T5 ON T4.Member = T5.Athlete 
WHERE T4.Electoral_district = '14th Parliament of British Columbia' 
UNION ALL
SELECT T4.Electoral_district, T4.Party, T6.Rank, T6.Athlete, T6.Nationality, T6.Time 
FROM T4 
JOIN T6 ON T4.Member = T6.Athlete 
WHERE T4.Electoral_district = '14th Parliament of British Columbia' 
UNION ALL
SELECT T4.Electoral_district, T4.Party, T7.Rank, T7.Athlete, T7.Nationality, T7.Time 
FROM T4 
JOIN T7 ON T4.Member = T7.Athlete 
WHERE T4.Electoral_district = '14th Parliament of British Columbia' 
UNION ALL
SELECT T4.Electoral_district, T4.Party, T5.Rank, T5.Athlete, T5.Nationality, T5.Time 
FROM T4 
JOIN T5 ON T4.Member = T5.Athlete 
WHERE T5.Time LIKE '%1898%' 
UNION ALL
SELECT T4.Electoral_district, T4.Party, T6.Rank, T6.Athlete, T6.Nationality, T6.Time 
FROM T4 
JOIN T6 ON T4.Member = T6.Athlete 
WHERE T6.Time LIKE '%1913%' 
UNION ALL
SELECT T4.Electoral_district, T4.Party, T7.Rank, T7.Athlete, T7.Nationality, T7.Time 
FROM T4 
JOIN T7 ON T4.Member = T7.Athlete 
WHERE T7.Time LIKE '%1920%'

  T4.Electoral_district,

  T5.Athlete, 
  T5.Nationality, 
  T5.Time, 
  T6.Rank, 
  T6.Athlete, 
  T6.Nationality, 
  T6.Time, 
  T7.Rank, 
  T7.Athlete, 
  T7.Nationality, 
  T7.Time
FROM 
  T4
  LEFT JOIN T5 ON 1 = 1
  LEFT JOIN T6 ON 1 = 1
  LEFT JOIN T7 ON 1 = 1
UNION ALL

  T4.Electoral_district, 
  T4.Party, 
  NULL AS Rank, 
  NULL AS Athlete, 
  NULL AS Nationality, 
  NULL AS Time, 
  NULL AS Rank, 
  NULL AS Athlete,

  NULL AS Time, 
  NULL AS Rank, 
  NULL AS Athlete, 
  NULL AS Nationality, 
  NULL AS Time
FROM 
  T4
LIMIT 100;

DPR: Compile a comprehensive dataset on the film and music industries in the 1950s, including information on film releases, revenue, admissions, and production countries, as well as notable musical compositions, composers, and performances. The dataset should support analysis of trends and patterns in film and music production, comparisons of revenue and admissions across different countries and years, and identification of notable contributors and events that shaped the entertainment industry during this period.
dpr_text: Compile a comprehensive dataset on the film and music industries in the 1950s, including information on film releases, revenue, admissions, and production countries, as well as notable musical compositions, composers, and performances. The dataset should support analysis of trends and patterns in film and music production, comparisons of revenue and admissions across different countries and years, and identification of notable contributors and events that shaped the entertainment industry during this period.
generated_sql:
SELECT 
  T8.Film, 
  T8.Revenue, 
  T8.Admissions, 
  T8.International_market, 
  T8.Production_country, 
  T9.Composer, 
  T9.Composition, 
  T9.Performers, 
  T9.Date, 
  T9.Location 
FROM 
  T8 
  INNER JOIN T9 
  ON T8.Film = T9.Composition 
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
  T10.Title, 
  T10.Revenue, 
  T10.Admissions, 
  T10.Country, 
  T10.Director, 
  T10.Studio 
FROM 
  T10 
WHERE 
  T10.Date LIKE '195%'

  T10.Country,

  T10.Director, 
  T10.Studio, 
  T10.Revenue, 
  T10.Admissions, 
  T8.International_market, 
  T8.Film, 
  T8.Studio AS Studio_Film, 
  T8.Revenue AS Revenue_Film, 
  T8.Admissions AS Admissions_Film, 
  T8.Production_country, 
  T9.Composer,
